title: Official Military Personnel File of Creighton W. Abrams

accessRestriction.note: Some material may be redacted due to personal information.

creators.heading: Department of Defense. Department of the Army. U.S. Total Army Personnel Command. 12/8/1988-10/1/2003

scopeAndContentNote: This Official Military Personnel File includes records from the following folders: Service Documents (February 1932-March 1974);  Awards, Decorations, and Commendations (June 1938-September 1974); Efficiency/Fitness Reports (July 1937-August 1963); Medical Records (December 1931-April 1974); Photographs and Negatives (n.d.).
